# Welcome {.unnumbered}

**Methods Brown Bag** is a workshop series run by graduate students in the Department of Government at Georgetown University. Each session covers a tool, workflow, or research design concept — with reproducible examples in R and Quarto.

Sessions are held during the academic year. Materials from past sessions are collected here as a living reference.

[Download PDF](https://govtmethods.github.io/methodsbrownbag/Methods-Brown-Bag.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
```{=html}
<div id="gm-session-list" class="gm-index">
  <!-- populated from chapters-meta.json at page load -->
</div>
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
library(yaml)

or_empty <- function(x) if (is.null(x) || identical(x, "NULL")) "" else as.character(x)

get_file <- function(ch) {
  if (is.character(ch)) ch
  else if (is.list(ch) && !is.null(ch$file)) ch$file
  else NULL
}

config        <- yaml.load_file("_quarto.yml")
chapter_files <- Filter(Negate(is.null), lapply(config$book$chapters, function(ch) {
  f <- get_file(ch)
  if (is.null(f) || f == "index.qmd") NULL else f
}))

for (i in seq_along(chapter_files)) {
  f <- chapter_files[[i]]
  if (!file.exists(f)) next
  lines  <- readLines(f, warn = FALSE)
  delims <- which(trimws(lines) == "---")
  if (length(delims) < 2) next
  parsed <- tryCatch(
    yaml.load(paste(lines[(delims[1] + 1):(delims[2] - 1)], collapse = "\n")),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (is.null(parsed)) next

  title <- or_empty(parsed$title)
  authors <- parsed$author
  author_str <- if (is.null(authors)) "" else
    paste(sapply(authors, function(a) or_empty(if (is.list(a)) a$name else a)), collapse = ", ")
  date_str <- or_empty(parsed$date)

  meta <- Filter(nchar, c(author_str, date_str))
  cat("**Session ", i, " — ", title, "**  \n", sep = "")
  if (length(meta)) cat(paste(meta, collapse = " · "), "\n")
  cat("\n")
}
```
:::
